name: Pulse Runner
description: Električni signal putuje kroz proceduralnu neuronsku mrežu — kreći se samo na kucaj srca.

modules.src/main.js: Entry point — wires sve module, pokreće requestAnimationFrame loop, drži ctx i poziva updateSystems/render/updateHUD svaki frame
modules.src/config.js: Sve tuning konstante iz GDD: grid dimenzije po nivoima, puls formula, HP pravila, score formula, palete boja, SAVE_KEY
modules.src/state.js: Game state shape (grid, playerPos, hp, missCount, level, score, pulsePhase, queuedInput) + save/load samo highScore u localStorage
modules.src/input.js: Keyboard (arrow keys + WASD) i touch (swipe detection) — queued input buffer (max 1), novi input overwrite-uje stari
modules.src/render.js: Canvas rendering: pozadina, grid ćelije (zidovi/prazno), igrač (crveni kvadrat koji pulsira), collectibles (žuta glow), exit (tirkizna), puls flash overlay
modules.src/ui.js: DOM HUD (HP srca, score, level, miss counter), main menu overlay, game over ekran sa depth/score/PB i Restart dugmetom
modules.src/audio.js: Web Audio API: puls zvuk (sine 60Hz, kratki attack/decay kao EKG), collectible tone (440→880Hz, 80ms), game over glide (880→110Hz, 600ms), level transition flash zvuk
modules.src/systems/maze.js: Proceduralni grid generator: random postavi zidove, BFS solvability validacija (start→exit), do 10 retry-a pa smanji zidove 5% (još 5x), vrati Grid objekat
modules.src/systems/pulse.js: Puls timer — akumulira dt, na svakom intervalu emituje pulse event, prati input window (80% intervala), detektuje miss (prošao puls bez input-a), drži missCount
modules.src/systems/collision.js: Kretanje igrača kroz grid — proveri da li target ćelija nije zid/van grida, pomeri ili ignoriši; proveri collectible pickup (+1 HP, reset missCount); proveri exit (next level)
